name: Funkaso: Millet Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups millet flour (buy from health-food store)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the millet flour into a bowl and gradually pour in the warm water, stirring continuously until a smooth, runny paste is formed.
2. Set the batter aside for 4 hours (about 4:00 a.m.) before cooking.
3. Heat margarine or oil in a shallow pan or griddle plate.
4. When the fat is hot, beat the batter with a spoon.
5. Pour enough batter into the pan to make a saucer-sized pancake and cook until crisp. You may turn it once if desired, but it is not essential.
6. Remove the pancake and keep warm.
7. Cook the remaining pancakes in the same manner and serve with a main dish, or as a snack with honey or chutney.
